root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I bet everything on this project, even more than you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I bet everything on this project, even more than you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I bet everything on this project, even more than you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I applied to be an instructor at the Academy because I wanted to monitor Counters Legacy and make it even more successful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I applied to be an instructor at the Academy because I wanted to monitor Counters Legacy and make it even more successful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I applied to be an instructor at the Academy because I wanted to monitor Counters Legacy and make it even more successful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If this project continues to grow... maybe I can become someone in the same position as you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If this project continues to grow... maybe I can become someone in the same position as you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If this project continues to grow... maybe I can become someone in the same position as you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hi, everyone. It's me, Miya!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hi, everyone. It's me, Miya!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hi, everyone. It's me, Miya!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have you all heard about Counters Legacy? Everyone's talking about this game now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have you all heard about Counters Legacy? Everyone's talking about this game now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have you all heard about Counters Legacy? Everyone's talking about this game now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's simulation training that was only accessible at the Administration and the Academy, but they just opened a new server in Ground One.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's simulation training that was only accessible at the Administration and the Academy, but they just opened a new server in Ground One.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's simulation training that was only accessible at the Administration and the Academy, but they just opened a new server in Ground One.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-and we just signed a collaboration contract with them!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-and we just signed a collaboration contract with them!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-and we just signed a collaboration contract with them!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyone who's a Counter can play, so I hope to see you all in the game!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyone who's a Counter can play, so I hope to see you all in the game!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyone who's a Counter can play, so I hope to see you all in the game!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who knows? You might be able to join our party and play together!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who knows? You might be able to join our party and play together!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who knows? You might be able to join our party and play together!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know our viewers wouldn't miss this chance of a lifetime, right?94p
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know our viewers wouldn't miss this chance of a lifetime, right?94p
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know our viewers wouldn't miss this chance of a lifetime, right?94p

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're in it for the long run this time. It'll be exhausting, but I'll do my best, meow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're in it for the long run this time. It'll be exhausting, but I'll do my best, meow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're in it for the long run this time. It'll be exhausting, but I'll do my best, meow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's HRT Berry! What are they promoting?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's HRT Berry! What are they promoting?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's HRT Berry! What are they promoting?

root.m_Talk_ENG: U-um... could we also get a poster?
root.m_Talk_DEU: U-um... could we also get a poster?
root.m_Talk_FRA: U-um... could we also get a poster?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sure. Here you go.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sure. Here you go.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sure. Here you go.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're the ones promoting it, but why is everyone gathering around Gaeun...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're the ones promoting it, but why is everyone gathering around Gaeun...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're the ones promoting it, but why is everyone gathering around Gaeun...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um, could I also have one?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um, could I also have one?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um, could I also have one?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh?! Sure!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh?! Sure!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh?! Sure!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're a Counter, right? And seeing from your outfit... are you a <color=#ffd34c>fighter</color> type?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're a Counter, right? And seeing from your outfit... are you a <color=#ffd34c>fighter</color> type?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're a Counter, right? And seeing from your outfit... are you a <color=#ffd34c>fighter</color> type?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I forgot to take this off. I'm just an ordinary salaryman.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I forgot to take this off. I'm just an ordinary salaryman.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I forgot to take this off. I'm just an ordinary salaryman.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It just caught my interest. Thank you for the poster.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It just caught my interest. Thank you for the poster.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It just caught my interest. Thank you for the poster.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An ordinary salaryman in a <color=#ffd34c>suit with fighting gloves</color>...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: An ordinary salaryman in a <color=#ffd34c>suit with fighting gloves</color>...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: An ordinary salaryman in a <color=#ffd34c>suit with fighting gloves</color>...?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Counters Legacy...
